title: Skippy
description: Add the legendary cyberpunk pistol to Minecraft
body:
# **Skippy pistol from Cyberpunk 2077** ![REPLACE ME WITH YOUR ALT TEXT](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/4BmqTQs8/images/7c1a42ef6e8cd03ee5c2dbcf8ee63a5f225074f2.png) **To obtain it, rename a crossbow on the anvil "skippy". Works with Optifine or modification "[Cit Resewn](https://modrinth.com/mod/cit-resewn)" (Fabric)** **In the future it will be possible to replace the bow model** # **Social**

# **Support the project**
